lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਸੋਹਣਾ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਰ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: pir prabh saachaa sohanaa paaeeai gur beechaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: God is your Husband; He is Handsome and True. He is obtained by reflecting upon the Guru. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁੰਧੇ ਕੂੜਿ ਮੁਠੀ ਕੂੜਿਆਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: mundhe koorr mutthee koorriaar |
lines.english: O woman, the false ones are being cheated by falsehood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਕੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਛਾਣਈ ਤਿਨ ਕਿਉ ਰੈਣਿ ਵਿਹਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh kant na pachhaanee tin kiau rain vihaae |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs do not recognize their Husband Lord; how will they spend their life-night?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਰਬਿ ਅਟੀਆ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਜਲਹਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: garab atteea trisanaa jaleh dukh paaveh doojai bhaae |
lines.english: Filled with arrogance, they burn with desire; they suffer in the pain of the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਪਿਰੁ ਰਾਵਹਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਤਿਨਾ ਸੁਖੇ ਸੁਖਿ ਵਿਹਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sadaa pir raaveh aapanaa tinaa sukhe sukh vihaae |2|
lines.english: They enjoy their Husband Lord forever, and their life-night passes in the most blissful peace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੀਆ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਤਿਨ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabad rateea sohaaganee tin vichahu haumai jaae |
lines.english: The happy soul-brides are attuned to the Shabad; their egotism is eliminated from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨ ਵਿਹੂਣੀ ਪਿਰ ਮੁਤੀਆ ਪਿਰਮੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: giaan vihoonee pir muteea piram na paaeaa jaae |
lines.english: She is utterly lacking in spiritual wisdom; she is abandoned by her Husband Lord. She cannot obtain His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਹੁ ਮਿਲਹੁ ਸਹੇਲੀਹੋ ਮੈ ਪਿਰੁ ਦੇਹੁ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aavahu milahu saheleeho mai pir dehu milaae |
lines.english: Come and meet with me, my sister soul-brides, and unite me with my Husband.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਿਆਨ ਮਤੀ ਅੰਧੇਰੁ ਹੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਪਿਰ ਦੇਖੇ ਭੁਖ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: agiaan matee andher hai bin pir dekhe bhukh na jaae |
lines.english: In the darkness of intellectual ignorance, she cannot see her Husband, and her hunger does not depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਪਿਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: poorai bhaag satigur milai pir paaeaa sach samaae |3|
lines.english: She who meets the True Guru, by perfect good fortune, finds her Husband; she is absorbed in the True One. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਸਹੀਆ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: se saheea sohaaganee jin kau nadar karee |
lines.english: Those upon whom He casts His Glance of Grace become His happy soul-brides.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਵਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਆਪਣਾ ਹਉਮੈ ਦੂਰਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: ghar var paaeaa aapanaa haumai door karee |
lines.english: Within her own home, she finds her Husband Lord; her egotism is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਸਮੁ ਪਛਾਣਹਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਆਗੈ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: khasam pachhaaneh aapanaa tan man aagai dee |
lines.english: One who recognizes her Lord and Master places her body and mind in offering before Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਪਿਰੁ ਰਾਵਹਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਹਉ ਕੈ ਦਰਿ ਪੂਛਉ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eik pir raaveh aapanaa hau kai dar poochhau jaae |
lines.english: Some enjoy their Husband Lord; unto whose door should I go to ask for Him?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋਭਾਵੰਤੀਆ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥੪॥੨੮॥੬੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sobhaavanteea sohaaganee anadin bhagat karee |4|28|61|
lines.english: O Nanak, the happy soul-brides are embellished and exalted; night and day they are absorbed in devotional worship. ||4||28||61||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਉਪਾਏ ਆਪੇ ਵੇਖੈ ਕਿਸੁ ਨੇੜੈ ਕਿਸੁ ਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabh upaae aape vekhai kis nerrai kis door |
lines.english: He created all, and He Himself watches over us. Some are close to Him, and some are far away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੀ ਭਾਉ ਕਰਿ ਮੈ ਪਿਰੁ ਦੇਹੁ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sevee bhaau kar mai pir dehu milaae |
lines.english: I serve my True Guru with love, that He may lead me to Union with my Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁੰਧੇ ਤੂ ਚਲੁ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: mundhe too chal gur kai bhaae |
lines.english: O woman, you must walk in harmony with the Guru's Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਪਿਰੁ ਸੰਗੇ ਜਾਣਿਆ ਪਿਰੁ ਰਾਵੇ ਸਦਾ ਹਦੂਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jin pir sange jaaniaa pir raave sadaa hadoor |1|
lines.english: She who knows her Husband Lord to be always with her, enjoys His Constant Presence. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੀਆ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੀਗਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabad rateea sohaaganee sachai sabad seegaar |
lines.english: Attuned to the Shabad, the happy soul-brides are adorned with the True Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਵਹਿ ਪਿਰੁ ਆਪਣਾ ਸਹਜੇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: anadin raaveh pir aapanaa sahaje sach samaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Night and day, you shall enjoy your Husband, and you shall intuitively merge into the True One. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਜ ਸੁਹਾਵੀ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਵੈ ਭਗਤਿ ਭਰੇ ਭੰਡਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: sej suhaavee har rang ravai bhagat bhare bhanddaar |
lines.english: Upon her beautiful and cozy bed, she enjoys the Love of her Lord. She is overflowing with the treasure of devotion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਵਰੁ ਪਾਇਨਿ ਘਰਿ ਆਪਣੈ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਹੇਤਿ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: har var paaein ghar aapanai gur kai het piaar |
lines.english: Within their own home, they obtain the Lord as their Husband, with love for the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰੁ ਸਾਲਾਹਨਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਹਉ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: pir saalaahan aapanaa tin kai hau sad balihaarai jaau |
lines.english: I am forever a sacrifice to those who praise their Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਜਿ ਸਭਸੈ ਦੇਇ ਅਧਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: so prabh preetam man vasai ji sabhasai dee adhaar |2|
lines.english: That Beloved God abides in her mind; He gives His Support to all. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਅਰਪੀ ਸਿਰੁ ਦੇਈ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਲਾਗਾ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man tan arapee sir deee tin kai laagaa paae |
lines.english: I dedicate my mind and body to them, and give my head as well; I fall at their feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਇਕੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਉ ਚੁਕਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jinee ik pachhaaniaa doojaa bhaau chukaae |
lines.english: Those who recognize the One renounce the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਛਾਣੀਐ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੩॥੨੯॥੬੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh naam pachhaaneeai naanak sach samaae |3|29|62|
lines.english: The Gurmukh recognizes the Naam, O Nanak, and is absorbed into the True One. ||3||29||62||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀ ਸਚਾ ਸਚੁ ਤੂ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਤੇਰੈ ਚੀਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: har jee sachaa sach too sabh kichh terai cheerai |
lines.english: O Dear Lord, You are the Truest of the True. All things are in Your Power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀਹ ਤਰਸਦੇ ਫਿਰੇ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਭੇਟੇ ਪੀਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: lakh chauraaseeh tarasade fire bin gur bhette peerai |
lines.english: The 8.4 million species of beings wander around searching for You, but without the Guru, they do not find You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਸੇਵ ਕਰੀ ਸਚੁ ਗਹਿਰ ਗੰਭੀਰੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee sev karee sach gahir ganbheerai |1|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, I serve the True One, who is Immeasurably Deep and Profound. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਬਖਸੇ ਬਖਸਿ ਲਏ ਸੂਖ ਸਦਾ ਸਰੀਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo bakhase bakhas le sookh sadaa sareerai |
lines.english: When the Dear Lord grants His Forgiveness, this human body finds lasting peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: man mere naam rate sukh hoe |
lines.english: O my mind, attuned to the Naam, you shall find peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਮ ਰਾਇ ਨੋ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਹੈ ਬਹਿ ਸਚਾ ਧਰਮੁ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: dharam raae no hukam hai beh sachaa dharam beechaar |
lines.english: The Righteous Judge of Dharma, by the Hukam of God's Command, sits and administers True Justice.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹੀਐ ਦੂਜਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee naam salaaheeai doojaa avar na koe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Follow the Guru's Teachings, and praise the Naam; there is no other at all. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਦੁਸਟੁ ਆਤਮਾ ਓਹੁ ਤੇਰੀ ਸਰਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: doojai bhaae dusatt aatamaa ohu teree sarakaar |
lines.english: Those evil souls, ensnared by the love of duality, are subject to Your Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਧਿਆਤਮੀ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਤਾਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਜਪਹਿ ਏਕੁ ਮੁਰਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: adhiaatamee har gun taas man japeh ek muraar |
lines.english: The souls on their spiritual journey chant and meditate within their minds on the One Lord, the Treasure of Excellence.
